headline: Goucher Group, LLC
about:
Ninette Goucher, CPA 

Ninette Goucher is the Principal of Goucher Group, LLC. Ninette graduated from the University of Nevada in 1993 and operated as a sole practitioner in Reno, Nevada prior to moving to Coeur d’Alene in 2005.  Ninette was a Partner with Magnuson, McHugh & Co as well as the Director of the Consulting and Accounting Services Department.  She then spent a couple years in Corporate Accounting.  Realizing her true passion was working with small business owners, she opened her own firm, Goucher Group, LLC.  She is a licensed CPA in Idaho and a member of the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants and the Idaho Society of Certified Public Accountants (ISCPA). She works with her clients to create a successful foundation for their business through well-organized financial records.  She helps her clients monitor performance for continued success. Ninette is a 2010 graduate of the Chamber of Commerce Leadership Coeur d’Alene Program and a 2018 graduate of the Advanced Leadership Coeur d’Alene Program.  She volunteers with many non-profits in the area and is currently the Treasurer of the EXCEL Foundation.

headline: CPA at Stuart J. Cohen & Co., P.C.

Hire an experienced accounting pro to help your business succeed by saving you time and money on your bookkeeping.  Use your time to grow your business while we ensure that your financials are accurate and timely.
about:
I started Bighorn Bookkeeping to help business owners achieve their goal of growing their business to its full potential.  With over 25 years as a CPA and Controller for small and medium-sized businesses, I have the experience and insight to provide you with meaningful, accurate, and timely financial information.
Bighorn Bookkeeping is based in Reno, NV and we utilize QuickBooks Online to support businesses everywhere with affordable in-person and online accounting services that provide busy owners with more free time so they can grow their revenues and maximize profits.  Most importantly, we give you the peace of mind knowing that your financials are precise when you hand them over to your tax preparer or bank.

Let’s discuss how Bighorn Bookkeeping can help your business achieve its full potential.

headline: CPA at Brotemarkle, Davis & Co LLP
Shareholder at Miles & Thirion CPA Firm, Inc.
about:
Robin Knuth has been in public accounting and has practiced as a certified public accountant for over 20 years. She holds a B.A. in Business Administration from the University of South Florida in Sarasota, where she graduated with honors in 1993. She also earned a B.A. in psychology from Edgecliff College. She serves as team leader for our Estate and Trust division.

Ms. Knuth’s areas of practice include tax preparation, tax planning, tax research, representation before the IRS, and estate and income tax matters of non-residents of the US.

Ms. Knuth is a member of the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA) and the Florida Institute of Certified Public Accountants (FICPA). She currently serves as treasurer for the local chapter of the FICPA. She has served in the past as Director of the FICPA; Treasurer of the Women's Legal Fund of Sarasota County; Board Member of the USF Sarasota/Manatee Alumni Association; and volunteer with Junior Achievement.

Born in Cincinnati, Ohio, Ms. Knuth has been a resident of Venice, Florida since 1982 and resides there with her husband.
